message:
🌱 Add n8n: Unable to add external NPM packages mission (#1444)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-24191-unable-to-add-external-npm-packages",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: Unable to add external NPM packages",
+    "description": "Unable to add external NPM packages. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\n### Bug Description\n\nThen trying to add a custom NPM package to a Docker image, I get the below error. It was working on v2.2.4, but is broken on v.2.2.5."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unable to add external NPM packages",
+        "description": "## Summary\n- Added call to `module.constructor._initPaths()` in task runner to initialize module paths from `NODE_PATH` environment variable\n\n## Related tickets and issues\n- Fixes #24191\n\n## Review / Merge checklist\n\n## Details\n\nThe issue was that while `NODE_PATH` environment variable was passed\n```yaml\nFROM n8nio/n8n:2.2.5\nUSER root\nRUN npm install -g word-extractor\nUSER node\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Unable to add external NPM packages is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n- Added call to `module.constructor._initPaths()` in task runner to initialize module paths from `NODE_PATH` environment variable\n\n## Related tickets and issues\n- Fixes #24191\n\n## Review / Merge checklist\n\n## Details\n\nThe issue was that while `NODE_PATH` environment variable was passed to the task runner process (since commit 906770a), Node.js doesn't automatically pick up changes to",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "FROM n8nio/n8n:2.2.5\nUSER root\nRUN npm install -g word-extractor\nUSER node",
+        "services:\n  n8n:\n    build: .\n    environment:\n      - NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL=*\n    volumes:\n      - ./data:/home/node/.n8n\n    ports:\n      - 5678:5678"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "n8n",
+      "community",
+      "workflow",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "n8n"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/24191",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/pull/24517"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 24,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with n8n installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-18T06:54:30.074Z",

+}
